title: Kylo's Fantasy Ores++
description: Even more mod compats for Fantasy Ores!
body:
This resource pack **further** expands upon CesarZorak's [**Fantasy Ores**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fantasy-ores-by-cesarzorak), adding support for a variety of popular modded ores not covered by mxKeaton's **[Fantasy Ores - Denis' Mod Compats](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fantasy-ores-denis-mod-compats)**, another FO resource pack that also covers a buncha different mods (hence the **++**)

**++ Supported Mods:**

*   [**Oreganized**](https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized)
*   [**Create**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create)
*   [**Create Ironworks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-ironworks)
*   [**Create: Creating Space**](https://modrinth.com/mod/creating-space)
*   [**Born in Chaos**](https://modrinth.com/mod/borninchaos)
*   [**Epic Paladins**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-paladins)
*   [**Iron’s Spellbooks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks)
*   [**Alex’s Caves**](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves)
*   [**Ice and Fire**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons)
*   [**Just Enough Guns**](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-guns)
*   [**Overworld Quartz**](https://modrinth.com/mod/overworld-quartz) and [**Sky's Overworld Quartz Ore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/skys-overworld-quartz)
*   [**Minecards**](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecards-forge)
*   [**Embers Rekindled**](https://modrinth.com/mod/embers)
*   [**Create: New Age**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-new-age)
*   [**Galosphere**](https://modrinth.com/mod/galosphere)
*   [**Spelunkery**](https://modrinth.com/mod/spelunkery)

To allow further compatibility and consistency with mxKeaton's compat pack, these ores lack missives (glowy-thingy) in exchange for fixing some stuff related to lighting, with Radrock Uranium Ore being the only exception. I only made this for a private modpack with a friend, but decided later on to publish this here and provide updates whenever I can.

*   As for the sorting order, load this ___above___ **Fantasy Ores**.
*   If you're using **Denis' Fantasy Ores Fix** (see the [other mod compat pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fantasy-ores-denis-mod-compats) for more details), the same rules apply (load this ___above___ it)

Feel free to comment suggestions/ mod requests and I'll see what I can do (as long as I'm available)

All credit goes to the creators of [Fantasy Ores](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fantasy-ores-by-cesarzorak), as well as the creator of [FO - Denis' Mod Compats](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fantasy-ores-denis-mod-compats) for the push and inspiration!
